mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive 20-day returns occur in less than 50% of low-rate periods.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate dropping below 5.0 percent signals labor market tightness that triggers inflation expectations and Fed tightening fears, causing immediate negative S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in more than 65% of instances where UNRATE crosses below the 5.0% threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates broad-based consumer demand strength that drives corporate earnings growth, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations in RSAFS and HOUST yield negative 60-day returns in more than 55% of observed cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indices reflect expanding manufacturing capacity and output utilization that supports equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases of more than 1.0% coincide with negative 20-day returns in more than 60% of observations during early-cycle phases.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation above 0.4 percent monthly triggers immediate market repricing of real yields and discount rates, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the following week.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL monthly spikes above 0.4% are followed by positive 5-day returns in more than 70% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and declining unemployment rates confirm robust labor market expansion that boosts consumer spending expectations, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Combined PAYEMS growth and UNRATE declines yield negative 20-day returns in more than 50% of triggered months.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real gross domestic product growth rates directly increase corporate revenue baselines and profit margins, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth above 2.0% is followed by negative 60-day returns in more than 55% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Two consecutive monthly declines in industrial production signal deteriorating manufacturing activity and supply chain constraints that trigger immediate equity sell-offs over the next week.
failure_condition: Consecutive INDPRO declines are followed by positive 5-day returns in more than 60% of instances.
